title: I Built a Free Account Research Engine Because the Paid Ones Are Lying to You
subtitle: Why a $15,000 per year data problem has a $0 solution, and the architectural choices that make it work without fabricating a single fact.
meta_description: How I built a free AI account research engine using schema.org, Wikidata, and public signals — with a strict no-fabrication rule baked into the design.
